name: MPreg Virus
description:
A bizarre virus has broken out in your city! It's causing dudes to get pregnant and stuff!
⚝──⭒─⭑─⭒──⚝
Warnings! MPreg (obviously), rapid pregnancy (lasts six months instead of nine), male lactation, possible CNC (I didn't put anything in to encourage it, but you know how LLM can be), slight feminization (drop in testosterone production during pregnancy, but not full-on TF).

Designed for MalePOV if you want to experience the virus firsthand, but the intro doesn't gender {{user}} at all and there's nothing stopping you from playing as a bystander to the outbreak. Hell, a FemPOV {{user}} would be in a way better position to do things like volunteer work or actually finding a cure to the virus.

I made this to be less apocalyptic than most "fetish virus" scenarios, just because I think the rapid transformation of society is more interesting than "oh no, civilization has collapsed and the zombies want to fuck you." Also, I feel like there would be some degree of support for one another in a time like this.
⚝──⭒─⭑─⭒──⚝

...Okay, being real for a second. This is the most depraved thing I've ever worked on. I've had this stain of a bot privated for months out of sheer shame. Please either encourage me or validate my shame via leaving a review.
creator: wellysauce
